      feed = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    887
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    888
                    
                    
                      
      page_token = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    889
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    890
                    2x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_gte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    891
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_gte <- as.character(strike_price_gte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    892
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    893
                    2x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_lte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    894
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_lte <- as.character(strike_price_lte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    895
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    896
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    897
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    898
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = paste0("/v1beta1/options/snapshots/", underlying_symbol),

                    		
                  

                  

                    899
                    2x
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    900
                    2x
                    
                      
          type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    901
                    2x
                    
                      
          expiration_date = expiration_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    902
                    2x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_gte = expiration_date_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    903
                    2x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_lte = expiration_date_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    904
                    2x
                    
                      
          strike_price_gte = strike_price_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    905
                    2x
                    
                      
          strike_price_lte = strike_price_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    906
                    2x
                    
                      
          root_symbol = root_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    907
                    2x
                    
                      
          feed = feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    908
                    2x
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    909
                    2x
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    910
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    911
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    912
                    2x
                    
                      
          snaps <- data$snapshots

                    		
                  

                  

                    913
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (is.null(snaps) || length(snaps) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    914
                    !
                    
                      
            return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    915
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    916
                    2x
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(snaps), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    917
                    4x
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_snapshot(snaps[[sym]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    918
                    4x
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    919
                    4x
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    920
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    921
                    4x
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    922
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    923
                    2x
                    
                      
          dt <- data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    924
                    2x
                    
                      
          if ("symbol" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    925
                    2x
                    
                      
            data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    926
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    927
                    2x
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    928
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    929
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    930
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    931
                    
                    
                      
  ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    932
                    
                    
                      
  private = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    933
                    
                    
                      
    .data_base_url = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    934
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    935
                    
                    
                      
    # Execute a market data API request (uses data base URL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    936
                    
                    
                      
    .data_request = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    937
                    
                    
                      
      endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    938
                    
                    
                      
      query = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    939
                    
                    
                      
      .parser = identity,

                    		
                  

                  

                    940
                    
                    
                      
      timeout = 30

                    		
                  

                  

                    941
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    942
                    7x
                    
                      
      return(alpaca_build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    943
                    7x
                    
                      
        base_url = private$.data_base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    944
                    7x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    945
                    7x
                    
                      
        method = "GET",

                    		
                  

                  

                    946
                    7x
                    
                      
        query = query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    947
                    7x
                    
                      
        keys = private$.keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    948
                    7x
                    
                      
        .perform = private$.perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    949
                    7x
                    
                      
        .parser = .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    950
                    7x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    951
                    7x
                    
                      
        timeout = timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    952
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    953
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    954
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    955
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/AlpacaTrading.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# R6 class for Alpaca order management.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' AlpacaTrading: Order Management

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Provides methods for placing, modifying, cancelling, and querying orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' on Alpaca's Trading API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' Inherits from [AlpacaBase]. All methods support both synchronous and

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' asynchronous execution depending on the `async` parameter at construction.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Purpose and Scope

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Place Orders**: Market, limit, stop, stop-limit, and trailing stop orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Order Classes**: Simple, bracket, OCO, and OTO orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Modify Orders**: Replace existing orders with updated parameters.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Cancel Orders**: Cancel individual orders or all open orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Query Orders**: List open, closed, or all orders with filtering.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' [Orders](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/orders-4)

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Endpoints Covered

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' | Method | Endpoint | HTTP |

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' |--------|----------|------|

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' | add_order | `POST /v2/orders` | POST |

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_orders | `GET /v2/orders` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_order | `GET /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_order_by_client_id | `GET /v2/orders:by_client_order_id` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' | modify_order | `PATCH /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | PATCH |

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_order | `DELETE /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_all_orders | `DELETE /v2/orders` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' # Place a limit order

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' order <- trading$add_order(

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   symbol = "AAPL", side = "buy", type = "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_in_force = "day", qty = 1, limit_price = 150

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' print(order)

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' # Cancel it

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' trading$cancel_order(order$id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom R6 R6Class

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
AlpacaTrading <- R6::R6Class(

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
  "AlpacaTrading",

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
  inherit = AlpacaBase,

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  public = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Place Order ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
    #' Place an Order

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
    #' Submits a new order to Alpaca. Supports all order types including

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
    #' market, limit, stop, stop-limit, and trailing stop. Also supports

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
    #' advanced order classes (bracket, OCO, OTO).

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
    #' `POST https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders`

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Create Order](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/postorder)

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X POST -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
    #'   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
    #'   -d '{"symbol":"AAPL","qty":"1","side":"buy","type":"market","time_in_force":"day"}' \

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders'

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Request

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "limit_price": "150.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "client_order_id": "my-order-001",

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_class": "simple"

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "client_order_id": "my-order-001",

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "created_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "updated_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "submitted_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "expired_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "canceled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaces": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_qty": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_avg_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "limit_price": "150.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "accepted",

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "legs": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_percent": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "hwm": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbol Character; ticker symbol (e.g., `"AAPL"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param side Character; `"buy"` or `"sell"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param type Character; order type: `"market"`, `"limit"`, `"stop"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"stop_limit"`, `"trailing_stop"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param time_in_force Character; `"day"`, `"gtc"`, `"opg"`, `"cls"`, `"ioc"`, `"fok"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param qty Numeric or NULL; number of shares. Mutually exclusive with `notional`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param notional Numeric or NULL; dollar amount. Market/day orders only.

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit_price Numeric or NULL; limit price. Required for `"limit"` and

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"stop_limit"` orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param stop_price Numeric or NULL; stop trigger price. Required for `"stop"` and

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"stop_limit"` orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param trail_price Numeric or NULL; trailing stop dollar offset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param trail_percent Numeric or NULL; trailing stop percentage offset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param extended_hours Logical or NULL; allow pre/post market execution.

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param client_order_id Character or NULL; unique client order ID (max 128 chars).

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param order_class Character or NULL; `"simple"`, `"bracket"`, `"oco"`, `"oto"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param take_profit List or NULL; `list(limit_price = ...)` for bracket orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param stop_loss List or NULL; `list(stop_price = ..., limit_price = ...)` for bracket orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param position_intent Character or NULL; `"buy_to_open"`, `"buy_to_close"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"sell_to_open"`, `"sell_to_close"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`) with columns:

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `id` (character): Order UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `client_order_id` (character): Client order ID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `symbol` (character): Ticker symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `side` (character): `"buy"` or `"sell"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `type` (character): Order type.

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `time_in_force` (character): Time in force.

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `status` (character): Order status (e.g., `"accepted"`, `"new"`, `"filled"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `qty` (character): Requested quantity.

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `filled_qty` (character): Quantity filled so far.

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `filled_avg_price` (character): Average fill price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `limit_price` (character): Limit price (if set).

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `stop_price` (character): Stop price (if set).

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `created_at` (character): Order creation timestamp.

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
    #' # Market order

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
    #' order <- trading$add_order(

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
    #'   symbol = "AAPL", side = "buy", type = "market",

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    #'   time_in_force = "day", qty = 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
    #' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
    #' # Limit order

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
    #' order <- trading$add_order(

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
    #'   symbol = "AAPL", side = "buy", type = "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
    #'   time_in_force = "day", qty = 1, limit_price = 150

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    #' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
    #' # Bracket order

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
    #' order <- trading$add_order(

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
    #'   symbol = "AAPL", side = "buy", type = "market",

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
    #'   time_in_force = "day", qty = 10, order_class = "bracket",

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
    #'   take_profit = list(limit_price = 200),

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
    #'   stop_loss = list(stop_price = 140, limit_price = 139)

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
    #' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    add_order = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
      symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
      side,

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
      type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
      time_in_force,

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
      qty = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
      notional = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
      limit_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
      stop_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
      trail_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
      trail_percent = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
      extended_hours = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
      client_order_id = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
      order_class = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
      take_profit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
      stop_loss = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
      position_intent = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    2x
                    
                      
      params <- validate_order_params(

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    2x
                    
                      
        symbol = symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    2x
                    
                      
        side = side,

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    2x
                    
                      
        type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    2x
                    
                      
        time_in_force = time_in_force,

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    2x
                    
                      
        qty = qty,

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    2x
                    
                      
        notional = notional,

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    2x
                    
                      
        limit_price = limit_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    2x
                    
                      
        stop_price = stop_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    2x
                    
                      
        trail_price = trail_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    2x
                    
                      
        trail_percent = trail_percent,

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    2x
                    
                      
        extended_hours = extended_hours,

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    2x
                    
                      
        client_order_id = client_order_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    2x
                    
                      
        order_class = order_class,

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    2x
                    
                      
        take_profit = take_profit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    2x
                    
                      
        stop_loss = stop_loss,

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    2x
                    
                      
        position_intent = position_intent

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/orders",

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    2x
                    
                      
        method = "POST",

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    2x
                    
                      
        body = params,

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = as_dt_row

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Query Orders ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
    #' List Orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves a list of orders with optional filtering by status, symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
    #' side, and date range. Supports pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders`

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    
                    
                      
    #' [List Orders](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/getallorders)

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X GET -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders?status=open&limit=50&direction=desc'

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    
                    
                      
    #' [

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
    #'   {

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "client_order_id": "my-order-001",

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "created_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "updated_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "submitted_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "filled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "expired_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "canceled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "replaces": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "filled_qty": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "filled_avg_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "limit_price": "150.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "status": "new",

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "legs": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "trail_percent": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "trail_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "hwm": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    
                    
                      
    #'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    
                    
                      
    #' ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param status Character or NULL; `"open"`, `"closed"`, `"all"`. Default `"open"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit Integer or NULL; max orders (default 50, max 500).

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param after Character or NULL; only orders submitted after this timestamp.

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param until Character or NULL; only orders submitted before this timestamp.

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param direction Character or NULL; `"asc"` or `"desc"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param nested Logical or NULL; roll up multi-leg orders under `legs`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols Character or NULL; comma-separated symbol filter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param side Character or NULL; filter by side.

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`) with

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    
                    
                      
    #'   the same columns as `add_order()` return value.

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    
                    
                      
    #' open_orders <- trading$get_orders(status = "open")

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(open_orders)

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
    get_orders = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    
                    
                      
      status = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    
                    
                      
      after = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    
                    
                      
      until = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    
                    
                      
      direction = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
      nested = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    
                    
                      
      symbols = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    
                    
                      
      side = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    1x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/orders",

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    1x
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    1x
                    
                      
          status = status,

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    1x
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    1x
                    
                      
          after = after,

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    1x
                    
                      
          until = until,

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    1x
                    
                      
          direction = direction,

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    1x
                    
                      
          nested = nested,

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    1x
                    
                      
          symbols = symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    1x
                    
                      
          side = side

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    1x
                    
                      
        .parser = as_dt_list

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Order by ID

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves a single order by its UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/{order_id}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Get Order](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/getorderbyorderid)

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X GET -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f'

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    
                    
                      
    #' {
