                    360
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "client_order_id": "my-order-001",

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "created_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "updated_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:05.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "submitted_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:05.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "expired_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "canceled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaces": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_avg_price": "149.85",

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "limit_price": "150.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "filled",

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "legs": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_percent": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "hwm": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param order_id Character; order UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param nested Logical or NULL; include leg orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`), single row.

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      
    #' order <- trading$get_order("some-order-uuid")

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(order)

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    
                    
                      
    get_order = function(order_id, nested = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    1x
                    
                      
      endpoint <- paste0("/v2/orders/", order_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    1x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    1x
                    
                      
        query = list(nested = nested),

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    1x
                    
                      
        .parser = as_dt_row

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Order by Client Order ID

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves a single order by its client order ID. Useful for idempotent

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    
                    
                      
    #' order tracking in production systems.

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/by_client_order_id`

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    424

                    425

                    426
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    427

                    428

                    429

                    430

                    431

                    432
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    435
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    437

                    438

                    439

                    440

                    441

                    442

                    443
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "canceled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaces": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_avg_price": "149.85",

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    458

                    459

                    460

                    461

                    466

                    467

                    468

                    469
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param client_order_id Character; the client order ID (max 128 chars).

                    		
                  

                  

                    472

                    473

                    474

                    475

                    476

                    478

                    479

                    480

                    481
                    2x

                    482
                    2x

                    483
                    2x
                    
                      
        query = list(client_order_id = client_order_id),

                    		
                  

                  

                    484
                    2x

                    485

                    486

    # ---- Modify Order ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    489
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    490
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    491
                    
                    
                      
    #' Replace (Modify) an Order

                    		
                  

                  

                    492
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    493
                    
                    
                      
    #' Replaces an existing order with updated parameters. The original order

                    		
                  

                  

                    494
                    
                    
                      
    #' is cancelled and a new order is created atomically.

                    		
                  

                  

                    495
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    496
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    497
                    
                    
                      
    #' `PATCH https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/{order_id}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    498
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    499
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    500
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Replace Order](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/patchorder)

                    		
                  

                  

                    501
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    502
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    503
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    504
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    505
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X PATCH -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    506
                    
                    
                      
    #'   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    507
                    
                    
                      
    #'   -d '{"qty":"2","limit_price":"155.00"}' \

                    		
                  

                  

                    508
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f'

                    		
                  

                  

                    509
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    510
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    511
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Request

                    		
                  

                  

                    512
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    513
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    514
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "2",

                    		
                  

                  

                    515
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    516
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "limit_price": "155.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    517
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    518
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    519
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "client_order_id": "my-order-001-modified"

                    		
                  

                  

                    520
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    521
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    522
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    523
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    524
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    525
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    526
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "e7f3c1a2-8d5b-4f6e-9a2c-1b3d5e7f9a1c",

                    		
                  

                  

                    527
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "client_order_id": "my-order-001-modified",

                    		
                  

                  

                    528
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "created_at": "2026-03-10T14:35:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    529
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "updated_at": "2026-03-10T14:35:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    530
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "submitted_at": "2026-03-10T14:35:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    531
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    532
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "expired_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    533
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "canceled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    534
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    535
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    536
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    537
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "replaces": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    538
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    539
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    540
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    541
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    542
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "qty": "2",

                    		
                  

                  

                    543
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_qty": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    544
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "filled_avg_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    545
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    546
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    547
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    548
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    549
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    550
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "limit_price": "155.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    551
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    552
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "accepted",

                    		
                  

                  

                    553
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    554
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "legs": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    555
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_percent": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    556
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trail_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    557
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "hwm": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    558
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    559
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    560
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    561
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param order_id Character; order UUID to replace.

                    		
                  

                  

                    562
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param qty Numeric or NULL; new quantity.

                    		
                  

                  

                    563
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param time_in_force Character or NULL; new time in force.

                    		
                  

                  

                    564
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit_price Numeric or NULL; new limit price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    565
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param stop_price Numeric or NULL; new stop price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    566
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param trail Numeric or NULL; new trail value.

                    		
                  

                  

                    567
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param client_order_id Character or NULL; new client order ID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    568
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`) with

                    		
                  

                  

                    569
                    
                    
                      
    #'   the replacement order details.

                    		
                  

                  

                    570
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    571
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    572
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    573
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    574
                    
                    
                      
    #' modified <- trading$modify_order("some-order-uuid", limit_price = 155)

                    		
                  

                  

                    575
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(modified)

                    		
                  

                  

                    576
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    577
                    
                    
                      
    modify_order = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    578
                    
                    
                      
      order_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    579
                    
                    
                      
      qty = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    580
                    
                    
                      
      time_in_force = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    581
                    
                    
                      
      limit_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    582
                    
                    
                      
      stop_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    583
                    
                    
                      
      trail = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    584
                    
                    
                      
      client_order_id = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    585
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    586
                    1x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    587
                    !
                    
                      
        qty <- as.character(qty)

                    		
                  

                  

                    588
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    589
                    1x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(limit_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    590
                    1x
                    
                      
        limit_price <- as.character(limit_price)

                    		
                  

                  

                    591
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    592
                    1x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(stop_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    593
                    !
                    
                      
        stop_price <- as.character(stop_price)

                    		
                  

                  

                    594
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    595
                    1x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(trail)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    596
                    !
                    
                      
        trail <- as.character(trail)

                    		
                  

                  

                    597
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    598
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    599
                    1x
                    
                      
      endpoint <- paste0("/v2/orders/", order_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    600
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    601
                    1x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    602
                    1x
                    
                      
        method = "PATCH",

                    		
                  

                  

                    603
                    1x
                    
                      
        body = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    604
                    1x
                    
                      
          qty = qty,

                    		
                  

                  

                    605
                    1x
                    
                      
          time_in_force = time_in_force,

                    		
                  

                  

                    606
                    1x
                    
                      
          limit_price = limit_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    607
                    1x
                    
                      
          stop_price = stop_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    608
                    1x
                    
                      
          trail = trail,

                    		
                  

                  

                    609
                    1x
                    
                      
          client_order_id = client_order_id

                    		
                  

                  

                    610
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    611
                    1x
                    
                      
        .parser = as_dt_row

                    		
                  

                  

                    612
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    613
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    614
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    615
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Cancel Orders ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    616
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    617
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    618
                    
                    
                      
    #' Cancel an Order

                    		
                  

                  

                    619
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    620
                    
                    
                      
    #' Cancels a single open order by its UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    621
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    622
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    623
                    
                    
                      
    #' `DELETE https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/{order_id}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    624
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    625
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    626
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Cancel Order](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/deleteorderbyorderid)

                    		
                  

                  

                    627
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    628
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    629
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    630
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    631
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X DELETE -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    632
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders/b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f'

                    		
                  

                  

                    633
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    634
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    635
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    636
                    
                    
                      
    #' The API returns HTTP 204 (No Content) on success. This method returns a

                    		
                  

                  

                    637
                    
                    
                      
    #' confirmation `data.table`:

                    		
                  

                  

                    638
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    639
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    640
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "order_id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    641
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "cancelled"

                    		
                  

                  

                    642
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    643
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    644
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    645
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param order_id Character; order UUID to cancel.

                    		
                  

                  

                    646
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`), single row with columns:

                    		
                  

                  

                    647
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `order_id` (character): The cancelled order UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    648
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `status` (character): `"cancelled"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    649
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    650
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    651
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    652
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    653
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading$cancel_order("some-order-uuid")

                    		
                  

                  

                    654
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    655
                    
                    
                      
    cancel_order = function(order_id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    656
                    1x
                    
                      
      endpoint <- paste0("/v2/orders/", order_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    657
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    658
                    1x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    659
                    1x
                    
                      
        method = "DELETE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    660
                    1x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    661
                    1x
                    
                      
          return(data.table::data.table(

                    		
                  

                  

                    662
                    1x
                    
                      
            order_id = order_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    663
                    1x
                    
                      
            status = "cancelled"

                    		
                  

                  

                    664
                    
                    
                      
          )[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    665
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    666
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    667
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    668
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    669
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    670
                    
                    
                      
    #' Cancel All Open Orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    671
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    672
                    
                    
                      
    #' Cancels all open orders. Returns a list of orders that were cancelled.

                    		
                  

                  

                    673
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    674
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    675
                    
                    
                      
    #' `DELETE https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders`

                    		
                  

                  

                    676
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    677
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    678
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Cancel All Orders](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/deleteallorders)

                    		
                  

                  

                    679
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-03-10

                    		
                  

                  

                    680
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    681
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    682
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    683
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -X DELETE -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    684
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/orders'

                    		
                  

                  

                    685
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    686
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    687
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    688
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    689
                    
                    
                      
    #' [

                    		
                  

                  

                    690
                    
                    
                      
    #'   {

                    		
                  

                  

                    691
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    692
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "status": 200,

                    		
                  

                  

                    693
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "body": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    694
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "id": "b3a0b82d-62f4-4c23-87a5-3e5b1e3c0a1f",

                    		
                  

                  

                    695
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "client_order_id": "my-order-001",

                    		
                  

                  

                    696
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "created_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    697
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "updated_at": "2026-03-10T14:40:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    698
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "submitted_at": "2026-03-10T14:30:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    699
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "filled_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    700
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "expired_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    701
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "canceled_at": "2026-03-10T14:40:00.000000Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    702
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "failed_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    703
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "replaced_at": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    704
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "replaced_by": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    705
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "replaces": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    706
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "asset_id": "b0b6dd9d-8b9b-48a9-ba46-b9d54906e415",

                    		
                  

                  

                    707
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    708
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "asset_class": "us_equity",

                    		
                  

                  

                    709
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "notional": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    710
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "qty": "1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    711
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "filled_qty": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    712
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "filled_avg_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    713
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "order_class": "simple",

                    		
                  

                  

                    714
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "order_type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    715
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "type": "limit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    716
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "side": "buy",

                    		
                  

                  

                    717
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "time_in_force": "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    718
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "limit_price": "150.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    719
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "stop_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    720
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "status": "pending_cancel",

                    		
                  

                  

                    721
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "extended_hours": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    722
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "legs": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    723
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "trail_percent": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    724
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "trail_price": null,

                    		
                  

                  

                    725
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "hwm": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    726
                    
                    
                      
    #'     }

                    		
                  

                  

                    727
                    
                    
                      
    #'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    728
                    
                    
                      
    #' ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    729
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    730
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    731
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `data.table` (or `promise<data.table>` if `async = TRUE`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    732
                    
                    
                      
    #'   When orders are cancelled, one row per order with full order details.

                    		
                  

                  

                    733
                    
                    
                      
    #'   When no open orders exist, a single confirmation row with columns:

                    		
                  

                  

                    734
                    
                    
                      
    #'   - `status` (character): `"cancelled"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    735
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    736
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    737
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    738
                    
                    
                      
    #' trading <- AlpacaTrading$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    739
                    
                    
                      
    #' cancelled <- trading$cancel_all_orders()

                    		
                  

                  

                    740
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(cancelled)

                    		
                  

                  

                    741
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    742
                    
                    
                      
    cancel_all_orders = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    743
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    744
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/orders",

                    		
                  

                  

                    745
                    2x
                    
                      
        method = "DELETE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    746
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    747
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (is.null(data) || length(data) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    748
                    1x
                    
                      
            return(data.table::data.table(status = "cancelled")[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    749
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    750
                    
                    
                      
          # Alpaca returns [{id, status, body: {order...}}, ...]

                    		
                  

                  

                    751
                    
                    
                      
          # Unwrap body into top-level fields

                    		
                  

                  

                    752
                    1x
                    
                      
          unwrapped <- lapply(data, function(item) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    753
                    1x
                    
                      
            body <- item$body

                    		
                  

                  

                    754
                    1x
                    
                      
            item$body <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    755
                    1x
                    
                      
            if (is.list(body)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    756
                    1x
                    
                      
              return(c(item, body))

                    		
                  

                  

                    757
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    758
                    !
                    
                      
              return(item)

                    		
                  

                  

                    759
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    760
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    761
                    1x
                    
                      
          return(as_dt_list(unwrapped))

                    		
                  

                  

                    762
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    763
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    764
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    765
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    766
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/backfill.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Bulk bar data download with CSV-based resume.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Backfill Historical Bar Data

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Downloads historical OHLCV bar data for one or more symbols and timeframes,

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' saving results to a CSV file. Supports resuming interrupted downloads by

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' reading existing data and skipping completed symbol-timeframe combinations.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param symbols Character vector; ticker symbols (e.g., `c("AAPL", "MSFT")`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param timeframes Character vector; bar timeframes (e.g., `c("1Day", "1Hour")`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   See `alpaca_timeframe_map` for valid values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param start Character or POSIXct; start date/time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param end Character or POSIXct; end date/time. Defaults to `Sys.time()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param path Character; file path for CSV output. Default `"alpaca_bars.csv"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param adjustment Character; price adjustment type. Default `"raw"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param feed Character or NULL; data feed (`"iex"` or `"sip"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sleep Numeric; seconds to pause between requests (rate limiting).

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `0.25`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys List; API credentials. Defaults to [get_api_keys()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data_base_url Character; market data base URL. Defaults to [get_data_base_url()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @return `data.table` with all downloaded data (invisibly). Also writes to CSV.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   Has a `"failures"` attribute listing any symbol-timeframe combos that failed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' # Download daily bars for AAPL and MSFT

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' dt <- alpaca_backfill_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'   symbols = c("AAPL", "MSFT"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   timeframes = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   start = "2020-01-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   path = "data/bars.csv"

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' # Resume an interrupted download

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' dt <- alpaca_backfill_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   symbols = c("AAPL", "MSFT", "TSLA"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   timeframes = c("1Day", "1Hour"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   start = "2020-01-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   path = "data/bars.csv"

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_backfill_bars <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
  symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
  timeframes = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
