#' Parse an RFC-3339 Timestamp to POSIXct

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x Character; RFC-3339 timestamp string (e.g., `"2024-01-15T14:30:00Z"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' @return POSIXct in UTC, or NA if `x` is NULL/NA.

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom lubridate as_datetime

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
rfc3339_to_datetime <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    39x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(x) || all(is.na(x))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(lubridate::NA_POSIXct_)

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    38x
                    
                      
  return(lubridate::as_datetime(x))

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Alpaca Bar Data to data.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' Converts a list of bar objects (with short field names `t`, `o`, `h`, `l`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' `c`, `v`, `n`, `vw`) into a tidy [data.table::data.table] with descriptive

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' column names.

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#' @param bars A list of bar objects from the Alpaca API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A [data.table::data.table] with columns: `timestamp`, `open`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#'   `high`, `low`, `close`, `volume`, `trade_count`, `vwap`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
parse_bars <- function(bars) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    22x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(bars) || length(bars) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    21x
                    
                      
  dt <- data.table::rbindlist(bars, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    21x
                    
                      
  name_map <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    21x
                    
                      
    t = "timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    21x
                    
                      
    o = "open",

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    21x
                    
                      
    h = "high",

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    21x
                    
                      
    l = "low",

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    21x
                    
                      
    c = "close",

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    21x
                    
                      
    v = "volume",

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    21x
                    
                      
    n = "trade_count",

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    21x
                    
                      
    vw = "vwap"

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    21x
                    
                      
  idx <- names(dt) %in% names(name_map)

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    21x
                    
                      
  if (any(idx)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    21x
                    
                      
    data.table::setnames(dt, names(dt)[idx], name_map[names(dt)[idx]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    21x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(dt, to_snake_case(names(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    21x
                    
                      
  if ("timestamp" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    21x
                    
                      
    dt[, timestamp := rfc3339_to_datetime(timestamp)]

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    21x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Multi-Symbol Bar Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca's multi-symbol bars endpoint returns

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
#' `{"bars": {"AAPL": [...], ...}, "next_page_token": ...}`. This function

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
#' flattens that structure into a single data.table with a `symbol` column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data List; the parsed Alpaca response.

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A [data.table::data.table] with a `symbol` column prepended.

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
parse_multi_bars <- function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    5x
                    
                      
  bars_map <- data$bars

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(bars_map) || length(bars_map) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    5x
                    
                      
  dts <- lapply(names(bars_map), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    9x
                    
                      
    dt <- parse_bars(bars_map[[sym]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    9x
                    
                      
    if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    8x
                    
                      
      dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    8x
                    
                      
      data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    9x
                    
                      
    return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    5x
                    
                      
  return(data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Alpaca Trade Data to data.table (Long Format)

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
#' Converts a list of trade objects (with short field names) into a tidy

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
#' [data.table::data.table] with descriptive column names. Trade conditions

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
#' are expanded to long format: one row per condition, with parent trade

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
#' fields repeated. Trades with no conditions get a single row with

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
#' `condition = NA`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
#' @param trades A list of trade objects from the Alpaca API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A [data.table::data.table] with columns: `timestamp`, `price`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
#'   `size`, `exchange`, `condition`, `tape`, `id`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
parse_trades <- function(trades) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    11x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(trades) || length(trades) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    !
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
  # Extract conditions before rbindlist, then expand to long format

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    11x
                    
                      
  conditions_list <- lapply(trades, function(tr) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    14x
                    
                      
    conds <- tr[["c"]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    14x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(conds) || length(conds) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    3x
                    
                      
      return(NA_character_)

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    11x
                    
                      
    return(as.character(unlist(conds)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
  # Remove conditions from trades for clean rbindlist

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    11x
                    
                      
  trades_no_conds <- lapply(trades, function(tr) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    14x
                    
                      
    tr[["c"]] <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    14x
                    
                      
    return(tr)

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    11x
                    
                      
  dt <- data.table::rbindlist(trades_no_conds, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    11x
                    
                      
  name_map <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    11x
                    
                      
    t = "timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    11x
                    
                      
    p = "price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    11x
                    
                      
    s = "size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    11x
                    
                      
    x = "exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    11x
                    
                      
    z = "tape",

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    11x
                    
                      
    i = "id"

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    11x
                    
                      
  idx <- names(dt) %in% names(name_map)

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    11x
                    
                      
  if (any(idx)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    11x
                    
                      
    data.table::setnames(dt, names(dt)[idx], name_map[names(dt)[idx]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    11x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(dt, to_snake_case(names(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    11x
                    
                      
  if ("timestamp" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    11x
                    
                      
    dt[, timestamp := rfc3339_to_datetime(timestamp)]

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
  # Add a row index to track which trade each condition belongs to

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    11x
                    
                      
  dt[, .trade_idx := .I]

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
  # Expand conditions to long format

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    11x
                    
                      
  conds_dt <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(seq_along(conditions_list), function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    14x
                    
                      
    data.table::data.table(.trade_idx = i, condition = conditions_list[[i]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
  }))

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    11x
                    
                      
  dt <- dt[conds_dt, on = ".trade_idx"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    11x
                    
                      
  dt[, .trade_idx := NULL]

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    11x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Alpaca Quote Data to data.table

                    5x

                    242

                    243
                    5x
                    
                      
  quotes <- lapply(quotes, wrap_list_fields)

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    5x

                    245
                    5x

                    246

    t = "timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    5x
                    
                      
    ax = "ask_exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    5x
                    
                      
    ap = "ask_price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    5x
                    
                      
    "as" = "ask_size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    5x
                    
                      
    bx = "bid_exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    5x
                    
                      
    bp = "bid_price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    5x
                    
                      
    bs = "bid_size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    5x
                    
                      
    c = "conditions",

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    5x
                    
                      
    z = "tape"

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    5x
                    
                      
  idx <- names(dt) %in% names(name_map)

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (any(idx)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    5x
                    
                      
    data.table::setnames(dt, names(dt)[idx], name_map[names(dt)[idx]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    5x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(dt, to_snake_case(names(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    5x
                    
                      
  if ("timestamp" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    5x
                    
                      
    dt[, timestamp := rfc3339_to_datetime(timestamp)]

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    5x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    265

                    266
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Snapshot Data to data.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    
                    
                      
#' Flattens Alpaca's nested snapshot response (containing latestTrade,

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    
                    
                      
#' latestQuote, minuteBar, dailyBar, prevDailyBar) into a single-row

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    
                    
                      
#' data.table with prefixed column names.

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    
                    
                      
#' @param snapshot A named list representing an Alpaca snapshot.

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A single-row [data.table::data.table].

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
parse_snapshot <- function(snapshot) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(snapshot) || length(snapshot) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    !
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    
                    
                      
  # Flatten nested sections into a single list with prefixed raw names

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    12x
                    
                      
  sections <- c("latestTrade", "latestQuote", "minuteBar", "dailyBar", "prevDailyBar")

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    12x
                    
                      
  flat <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    12x
                    
                      
  for (section in sections) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    60x
                    
                      
    sub <- snapshot[[section]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    60x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(sub)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    40x
                    
                      
      prefix <- to_snake_case(section)

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    40x
                    
                      
      for (nm in names(sub)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    228x
                    
                      
        flat[[paste0(prefix, "_", nm)]] <- sub[[nm]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    12x
                    
                      
  dt <- as_dt_row(flat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (ncol(dt) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    !
                    
                      
    return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    
                    
                      
  # Expand abbreviated field names with explicit map

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    12x
                    
                      
  snapshot_name_map <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    
                    
                      
    # latestTrade

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_t = "latest_trade_timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_p = "latest_trade_price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_s = "latest_trade_size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_x = "latest_trade_exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_c = "latest_trade_conditions",

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_z = "latest_trade_tape",

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_i = "latest_trade_id",

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_trade_tks = "latest_trade_taker_side",

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
    # latestQuote

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_t = "latest_quote_timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_ax = "latest_quote_ask_exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_ap = "latest_quote_ask_price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_as = "latest_quote_ask_size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_bx = "latest_quote_bid_exchange",

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_bp = "latest_quote_bid_price",

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_bs = "latest_quote_bid_size",

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_c = "latest_quote_conditions",

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    12x
                    
                      
    latest_quote_z = "latest_quote_tape",

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
    # minuteBar

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_t = "minute_bar_timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_o = "minute_bar_open",

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_h = "minute_bar_high",

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_l = "minute_bar_low",

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_c = "minute_bar_close",

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_v = "minute_bar_volume",

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_n = "minute_bar_trade_count",

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    12x
                    
                      
    minute_bar_vw = "minute_bar_vwap",

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    
                    
                      
    # dailyBar

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    12x
                    
                      
    daily_bar_t = "daily_bar_timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    12x
                    
                      
    daily_bar_o = "daily_bar_open",

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    12x

                    332
                    12x

                    12x
                    
                      
    daily_bar_v = "daily_bar_volume",

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    12x
                    
                      
    daily_bar_n = "daily_bar_trade_count",

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    12x
                    
                      
    daily_bar_vw = "daily_bar_vwap",

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    
                    
                      
    # prevDailyBar

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_t = "prev_daily_bar_timestamp",

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_o = "prev_daily_bar_open",

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_h = "prev_daily_bar_high",

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_l = "prev_daily_bar_low",

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_c = "prev_daily_bar_close",

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_v = "prev_daily_bar_volume",

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_n = "prev_daily_bar_trade_count",

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    12x
                    
                      
    prev_daily_bar_vw = "prev_daily_bar_vwap"

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    12x
                    
                      
  idx <- names(dt) %in% names(snapshot_name_map)

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (any(idx)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    12x
                    
                      
    data.table::setnames(dt, names(dt)[idx], snapshot_name_map[names(dt)[idx]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    12x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(dt, to_snake_case(names(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    12x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Alpaca News Response to Long-Format data.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      
#' Expands the `symbols` array field so that each news article is represented

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    
                    
                      
#' by one row per related symbol. Articles with no symbols get a single row

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    
                    
                      
#' with `symbol = NA`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    
                    
                      
#' @param news_items A list of news article objects from the Alpaca API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A [data.table::data.table] in long format with a `symbol` column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    
                    
                      
parse_news <- function(news_items) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(news_items) || length(news_items) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    
                    
                      
  # Extract symbols before rbindlist, then expand to long format

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    4x
                    
                      
  symbols_list <- lapply(news_items, function(item) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    7x
                    
                      
    syms <- item[["symbols"]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    7x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(syms) || length(syms) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    !
                    
                      
      return(NA_character_)

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    7x
                    
                      
    return(as.character(unlist(syms)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    
                    
                      
  # Remove symbols from items for clean rbindlist

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    4x
                    
                      
  items_no_syms <- lapply(news_items, function(item) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    7x
                    
                      
    item[["symbols"]] <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    7x
                    
                      
    return(wrap_list_fields(item))

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    4x
                    
                      
  dt <- data.table::rbindlist(items_no_syms, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    4x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(dt, to_snake_case(names(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    
                    
                      
  # Add a row index to track which article each symbol belongs to

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    4x
                    
                      
  dt[, .article_idx := .I]

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    
                    
                      
  # Expand symbols to long format

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    4x
                    
                      
  syms_dt <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(seq_along(symbols_list), function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    7x
                    
                      
    data.table::data.table(.article_idx = i, symbol = symbols_list[[i]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    
                    
                      
  }))

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    4x
                    
                      
  dt <- dt[syms_dt, on = ".article_idx"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    4x
                    
                      
  dt[, .article_idx := NULL]

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    4x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse Alpaca Watchlist Response to Long-Format data.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    
                    
                      
#' Expands the `assets` array field so that each watchlist is represented

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    
                    
                      
#' by one row per asset. Watchlists with no assets get a single row with

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    
                    
                      
#' asset columns set to NA.

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      
#' @param wl A named list representing a single watchlist response from the

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    
                    
                      
#'   Alpaca API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A [data.table::data.table] in long format with asset columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    
                    
                      
#'   (prefixed `asset_`) alongside watchlist metadata.

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    
                    
                      
parse_watchlist <- function(wl) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(wl) || length(wl) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    !
                    
                      
    return(data.table::data.table()[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    5x
                    
                      
  assets <- wl[["assets"]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    5x
                    
                      
  wl[["assets"]] <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    
                    
                      
  # Build the parent watchlist row

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    5x
                    
                      
  parent <- as_dt_row(wl)

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(assets) || length(assets) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    
                    
                      
    # No assets: return one row with NA asset columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    !
                    
                      
    parent[, asset_id := NA_character_]

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    !
                    
                      
    parent[, asset_symbol := NA_character_]

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    !
                    
                      
    parent[, asset_name := NA_character_]

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    !
                    
                      
    return(parent[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    
                    
                      
  # Build the assets data.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    5x
                    
                      
  assets_dt <- data.table::rbindlist(assets, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    5x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(assets_dt, to_snake_case(names(assets_dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    
                    
                      
  # Prefix asset columns to avoid collision with watchlist columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    5x
                    
                      
  asset_cols <- names(assets_dt)

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    5x
                    
                      
  data.table::setnames(assets_dt, paste0("asset_", asset_cols))

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    
                    
                      
  # Cross-join: repeat parent row for each asset

                    		
                  

                  

                    431
                    5x
                    
                      
  parent_rep <- parent[rep(1L, nrow(assets_dt)), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    432
                    5x
                    
                      
  dt <- cbind(parent_rep, assets_dt)

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    5x
                    
                      
  return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/impl_bars.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Shared bar-fetching implementation with time-range segmentation.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca Timeframe-to-Seconds Mapping

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Maps Alpaca bar timeframe strings to their duration in seconds. Used for

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' time-range segmentation in bulk bar downloads.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_timeframe_map <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
  "1Min" = 60,

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
  "5Min" = 300,

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
  "15Min" = 900,

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
  "30Min" = 1800,

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
  "1Hour" = 3600,

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
  "2Hour" = 7200,

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
  "4Hour" = 14400,

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
  "1Day" = 86400,

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
  "1Week" = 604800,

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
  "1Month" = 2592000

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' Fetch Bars with Time-Range Segmentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' Fetches historical bar data for a single symbol, automatically segmenting

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' large date ranges into multiple API requests (Alpaca max 10,000 bars per

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' request). Returns a single `data.table` with deduplicated, sorted results.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @param symbol Character; ticker symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @param timeframe Character; bar timeframe (e.g., `"1Day"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param start POSIXct or character; start timestamp.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @param end POSIXct or character; end timestamp.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys List; API credentials from [get_api_keys()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data_base_url Character; market data API base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .perform Function; httr2 perform function.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @param is_async Logical; async mode flag.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @param adjustment Character; price adjustment (`"raw"`, `"split"`, `"dividend"`, `"all"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @param feed Character or NULL; data feed (`"iex"` or `"sip"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @param limit_per_request Integer; max bars per request. Default 10000.

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sleep Numeric; seconds to sleep between requests. Default 0.2.

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @return `data.table` with columns: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   trade_count, vwap.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_fetch_bars <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
  timeframe = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
  start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
  end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
  keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  data_base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
  .perform = httr2::req_perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  is_async = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  adjustment = "raw",

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
  feed = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  limit_per_request = 10000L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  sleep = 0.2

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
  # Convert to POSIXct if needed

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (is.character(start)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    1x
                    
                      
    start <- lubridate::as_datetime(start, tz = "UTC")

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (is.character(end)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    1x
                    
                      
    end <- lubridate::as_datetime(end, tz = "UTC")

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
  bar_seconds <- alpaca_timeframe_map[[timeframe]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(bar_seconds)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    !
                    
                      
    rlang::abort(paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
      "Unknown timeframe: ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
      timeframe,

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
      ". Valid: ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
      paste(names(alpaca_timeframe_map), collapse = ", ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
  # Compute segments

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    1x
                    
                      
  span_seconds <- lubridate::time_length(end - start, unit = "seconds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    1x
                    
                      
  segment_seconds <- limit_per_request * bar_seconds

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    1x
                    
                      
  n_segments <- max(1L, ceiling(span_seconds / segment_seconds))

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  # Build segment boundaries

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    1x
                    
                      
  segments <- vector("list", n_segments)

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    1x
                    
                      
  seg_start <- start

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    1x
                    
                      
  for (i in seq_len(n_segments)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    1x
                    
                      
    seg_end <- min(seg_start + segment_seconds, end)

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    1x
                    
                      
    segments[[i]] <- list(start = seg_start, end = seg_end)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    1x
                    
                      
    seg_start <- seg_end

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    1x
                    
                      
  combine_results <- function(results) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    1x
                    
                      
    combined <- data.table::rbindlist(results, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    1x
                    
                      
    if (nrow(combined) > 0 && "timestamp" %in% names(combined)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    1x
                    
                      
      combined <- unique(combined, by = "timestamp")

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    1x
                    
                      
      data.table::setorder(combined, timestamp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(combined[])
